Video.summary: Lainie and Justin have 9 month old baby together. Justin abuses Lainie because he thinks she’s cheating. She’s come here to pass a lie-detector test to prove her fidelity. But how will Steve react when he confronts Justin?
Video.title: You Better Not Fail That Test!

Image.alt: You Better Not Fail That Test!
You Better Not Fail That Test!
You Better Not Fail That Test!

Video.summary: Ashilaye says Romeo is always flirting with other women online and has photos of naked women on his phone; Tiffany thinks her husband had sex with her best friend.
Video.title: I Didn't See That Coming

Image.alt: I Didn't See That Coming
I Didn't See That Coming
I Didn't See That Coming

Video.summary: Perry and Stephanie started having an affair while Ashley was at rehab. Now Ashley is here to confront Perry for not taking responsibility for their daughter. Then, after they split up, Amanda started accusing James' new girlfriend of being abusive.
Video.title: Angry Moms Confront

Image.alt: Angry Moms Confront
Angry Moms Confront
Angry Moms Confront

Video.summary: Steve's looking back on some of the funniest moments from his show. You'll definitely laugh out loud at these unforgettable guests. Don't miss one second of the fun on today's Steve Wilkos Show.
Video.title: The Lighter Side of Steve

Image.alt: The Lighter Side of Steve
The Lighter Side of Steve
The Lighter Side of Steve

Video.summary: Alec called the show to say that his girlfriend Tori is being physically and mentally abusive. He says he needs Steve to help him give her a wakeup call and start showing him the respect that he deserves.
Video.title: My Girlfriend Beats Me

Image.alt: My Girlfriend Beats Me
My Girlfriend Beats Me
My Girlfriend Beats Me

Video.summary: Katrina is fed up with her boyfriend Ismael's abusive and controlling ways. Katrina says Ismael acts this way because he believes she has been cheating. Then, Christie has been married to Chris for 8 months and he already suspects her infidelity.
Video.title: Accusers Turned Abusers

Image.alt: Accusers Turned Abusers
Accusers Turned Abusers
Accusers Turned Abusers

Video.summary: Maria is convinced that her son’s ex-girlfriend Amy and her new boyfriend Brian are abusing and neglecting her granddaughter. But Amy says that Maria is racist and angry because her granddaughter is being raised in a Hispanic household
Video.title: Who’s Hurting My Granddaughter?

Image.alt: Who’s Hurting My Granddaughter?
Who’s Hurting My Granddaughter?
Who’s Hurting My Granddaughter?

Video.summary: Denise found out that Jamaul had another woman staying with him while she was out of town; Donna's husband claims that she has been unfaithful; Jason and Tammy's rocky relationship; lie detector tests for cheating accusations.
Video.title: Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?

Image.alt: Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?
Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?
Will Our Relationship Survive The Results?

Video.summary: Colleen's son, Dalton has suffered with cancer for ten years. Patrick, the boy's father, left the picture when Dalton was only an infant, and after falling on hard times ended up homeless. But now he wants to be back in Dalton's life.
Video.title: Where's That Fight For Your Son?

Image.alt: Where's That Fight For Your Son?
Where's That Fight For Your Son?
Where's That Fight For Your Son?

Video.summary: Cassey believes she recently uncovered her ex-husband Calvin’s evil deeds, which he was trying to cover up with gifts for his daughter, but did he actually molest her daughter? Or has she had it all wrong?
Video.title: I Want Justice for My Daughter

Image.alt: I Want Justice for My Daughter
I Want Justice for My Daughter
I Want Justice for My Daughter

Video.summary: Nicole thinks Sean openly cheats on her, but she's the one who gets the positive test result; Imani sports the promise ring from Charles, but she may have to return it after contracting a sexually transmitted disease.
Video.title: You Caught an S.T.D. Just Confess

Image.alt: You Caught an S.T.D. Just Confess
You Caught an S.T.D. Just Confess
You Caught an S.T.D. Just Confess

Video.summary: Jennifer claims she was sexually abused by her stepfather Allen and moved in with her best friend’s family to protect herself. 15 years later, her mother wants a second chance, but Jennifer is hesitant. Can Steve help mend this broken relationship?
Video.title: You Stole 15 Years of My Life

Image.alt: You Stole 15 Years of My Life
You Stole 15 Years of My Life
You Stole 15 Years of My Life

Video.summary: This mother is trying to regain custody of her daughter which she was convicted of abusing and neglecting. But Steve will not let her even get close to that child.
Video.title: Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test

Image.alt: Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test
Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test
Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test

Video.summary: Amanda is here because she's trying to save her marriage to Bo. Bo's not sure if he's the father of her child and needs a DNA test to prove the truth. Plus, Julie says that she believes she's being cheated on by Stevie.
Video.title: I Need Answers Now

Image.alt: I Need Answers Now
I Need Answers Now
I Need Answers Now

Video.summary: Terry is accused of raping Angie’s young daughter and Angie allegedly witnessed this heinous incident. The child is now in the custody of her father Larry and his wife Angela, who are determined to get justice for her! Can Steve get to the truth?
Video.title: Somebody Has to Be Lying

Image.alt: Somebody Has to Be Lying
Somebody Has to Be Lying
Somebody Has to Be Lying

Video.summary: Danielle’s children were taken out of her care after cops observed all 4 children, including her newborn, home alone. Her fifth and sixth babies were taken from her care, too. But she wants to prove that she could be a good mom!
Video.title: 6 Kids Taken Away, but I Want More

Image.alt: 6 Kids Taken Away, but I Want More
6 Kids Taken Away, but I Want More
6 Kids Taken Away, but I Want More

Video.summary: Jesus is worried that Sonja is sleeping with other men in exchange for Cocaine. Then, Jessica is desperate to change Josh's controlling and abusive ways. She says she can no longer live with Josh if he's going to continue threatening her and accusing her of prostitution.
Video.title: Is My Wife A Prostitute

Image.alt: Is My Wife A Prostitute
Is My Wife A Prostitute
Is My Wife A Prostitute

Video.summary: Kathern says that her perfect marriage fell apart when her husband Lance confessed to kissing another woman, but she thinks there is more! Then, Justine believes Dorian has been sleeping with his best friend, Anayah, but Dorian denies it!
Video.title: Emotional Women Explode

Image.alt: Emotional Women Explode
Emotional Women Explode
Emotional Women Explode

Video.summary: Toni wants to prove she was not present at the time her boyfriend recorded her 1-year-old daughter playing with a firearm; Jada wants to know if it was her brother's girlfriend who called child protective services on her and why.
Video.title: Shocking Video: 1 Year Old Plays With A Gun

Image.alt: Shocking Video: 1 Year Old Plays With A Gun
Shocking Video: 1 Year Old Plays With A Gun
Shocking Video: 1 Year Old Plays With A Gun

Video.summary: Re'Nae and Candice think their sister stole a wallet and expensive jewelry from them; O.J. and Jasmine are accused of stealing money from the aunt who took them in when they were desperate.
Video.title: Is There A Thief In My Family?

Image.alt: Is There A Thief In My Family?
Is There A Thief In My Family?
Is There A Thief In My Family?

Video.summary: Amber may not be the best mother, but her abusive boyfriend Alex is making their relationship and her son's upbringing, even worse. Then, David is desperate to get his kids back from ex-wife Fawn, who alleges David was an abusive father.
Video.title: He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me

Image.alt: He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me
He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me
He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me

Video.summary: Dytazia wants to know if her mother tried to sell her for drugs; a young boy dies while in the care of a relative; Kristie wants to know who her biological father is.
Video.title: Did My Mom Try To Sell Me For Drugs?

Image.alt: Did My Mom Try To Sell Me For Drugs?
Did My Mom Try To Sell Me For Drugs?
Did My Mom Try To Sell Me For Drugs?

Video.summary: Lynette says she has found overwhelming proof that her fiance has been cheating; an update on a couple adding a third member to their relationship.
Video.title: A Threesome Betrayal Sent Me to Jail

Image.alt: A Threesome Betrayal Sent Me to Jail
A Threesome Betrayal Sent Me to Jail
A Threesome Betrayal Sent Me to Jail

Video.summary: Nykki, Jayda, Tammy and Pamela are here because Larry has fathered children with them. They say Larry not only an abusive deadbeat, but also engages in drugs, alcohol and pimps some of them out. Don’t miss the drama today!
Video.title: Steve is Speechless

Image.alt: Steve is Speechless
Steve is Speechless
Steve is Speechless

Video.summary: Kandie was the guardian of Katie’s son who died at only 9 months. Katie thinks that Kandie was involved with his death, but Kandie claims she cared more for him than Katie did and even accuses her of selling him for $23 to her! Who’s responsible for the tragic death of the child?
Video.title: She Sold Her Baby for $23

Image.alt: She Sold Her Baby for $23
She Sold Her Baby for $23
She Sold Her Baby for $23

Video.summary: Ryan denies that the condom his wife found in her car was his; Byronica, a young mother of five, says she will divorce her husband if he fails his lie-detector test.
Video.title: Steve's Had Enough!

Image.alt: Steve's Had Enough!
Steve's Had Enough!
Steve's Had Enough!

Video.summary: Lisa's longtime partner checks her body, spits on her and gives her black eyes; Cash says his ex-wife faked 11 pregnancies in the nine years they were together.
Video.title: 9 Years of Torture Ends Today

Image.alt: 9 Years of Torture Ends Today
9 Years of Torture Ends Today
9 Years of Torture Ends Today

Video.summary: Telisha and teen son Curtis return to the show because she wants him tested for paternity of a young woman's baby.
Video.title: DNA: I Need To Tell Her I'm Gay

Image.alt: DNA: I Need To Tell Her I'm Gay
DNA: I Need To Tell Her I'm Gay
DNA: I Need To Tell Her I'm Gay

Video.summary: Taquita’s ex is in custody for murdering her child, but her step-sisters think that she was aware of the man’s abusive behavior! Then, Dianne gained custody of Tanya’s toddler son after Tanya’s ex shook him, but she suspects Tanya is the abuser!
Video.title: You Failed to Protect Your Son

Image.alt: You Failed to Protect Your Son
You Failed to Protect Your Son
You Failed to Protect Your Son

Video.summary: Before Tonesha marries Theotis, she wants to know if he has cheated on her; Danielle suspects her partner, Shaun, is cheating and lying about being at work; less than a day after their wedding, Shante discovered that David sent naked photos to women.
Video.title: I Know He's Cheating, but He Destroyed the Evidence

Image.alt: I Know He's Cheating, but He Destroyed the Evidence
I Know He's Cheating, but He Destroyed the Evidence
I Know He's Cheating, but He Destroyed the Evidence

Video.summary: Chris fears that his girlfriend is still sleeping with her abusive ex; Quay thinks constant arguments over cheating caused her to miscarry her twins; Raena says her man accuses her of cheating with every man she happens to be around.
Video.title: Blindsided by Results

Image.alt: Blindsided by Results
Blindsided by Results
Blindsided by Results

Video.summary: Three years ago, Manny was accused of sexually molesting Elizabeth’s daughter. While he declares his innocence, Elizabeth has strong doubts and her husband Rodney is caught in the middle. Is he innocent?
Video.title: A Mother’s Rage

Image.alt: A Mother’s Rage
A Mother’s Rage
A Mother’s Rage
